summary.lv: Snowflake datu izstrādātāja loma (4–12 gadi), veidojot datu noliktavas konveijerus ar SQL, Python un ETL, ietverot datu kvalitāti, drošību un pārvaldību AWS/Azure/GCP vidē.
summary.en: Snowflake data developer role (4–12 years) building data-warehouse pipelines with SQL, Python, and ETL, covering data quality, security, and governance across AWS/Azure/GCP.
